title: Local authority capital expenditure and receipts in England: 2024 to 2025 provisional outturn and 2025 to 2026 forecast
body: "This release provides provisional outturn estimates of local authority capital expenditure and receipts in the financial year April 2024 to March 2025 and forecasts of local authority capital expenditure and receipts in the financial year April 2025 to March 2026. "

taxons.title: Local government finance and capital assets
